text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text: Yes, is there something I can help with?

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
...How am I faring? I have an important party
coming up, so I've been somewhat busy with
preparations.

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
If there isn't anything else, I must excuse myself...
Good day.
